CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2011 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-15-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Minor'S Compromise Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Jennifer de la Campa, Esq. for Petitioner(s): Michael Weber, as guardian ad litem for Milo Pearsall-Weber, a minor Claimant, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Attorney's fees: $45,742.00
Medical expenses total $6,735.56
Reimbursement of litigation costs and expenses total $1,296.43
A net balance of $137,226.01 to be deposited into a blocked account with
Wells Fargo Bank,1090 D Street, San Rafael, CA. until Minor's reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders signed by Judge Mason in open court.

Status hearing is set for Jan. 19, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. for filing the receipt to deposit money into blocked account.
